rhythm.title: Rhythm
rhythm.subtitle: Daily · Weekly · Monthly & yearly theme
rhythm.yearSummary: This year the cosmos is nudging you to adjust pace and structure. Focus on foundations, boundaries and rhythm.
rhythm.yearWork: Build the base first; don't rush to climb.
rhythm.yearLove: Value day-to-day comfort over quick commitment.
rhythm.yearSelf: Learn to say no with grace; stop ineffective drain.
rhythm.daYunPlaceholder: Full decade timeline will be available in subscription.
rhythm.weeklySummary: This week focus on what you've started; listen more, conclude less.
rhythm.monthlySummary: This month the cosmos is nudging you to tidy rhythm and foundations. Work: shore up basics. Love: read the pace. Self: set boundaries.
rhythm.weeklySummary1: This week focus on what you've started; listen more, conclude less.
rhythm.weeklySummary2: This week do less: cut ineffective social or low-value tasks; save time for what matters.
rhythm.weeklySummary3: Miscommunication is likely; confirm once to avoid back-and-forth.
rhythm.weeklySummary4: Energy favors action; take one small step, then adjust from feedback.
rhythm.weeklySummary5: If you feel stuck, pause; rest or a short walk can bring clarity.
rhythm.weeklySummary6: Watch spending and commitments; say no gently but clearly when needed.
rhythm.weeklySummary7: Be more honest in close or work relationships; real beats polite.
rhythm.weeklySummary8: Good week for reading, courses, or asking others; new input helps decisions.
rhythm.weeklySummary9: Finish in-progress items; deliver, close loops, then move on light.
rhythm.weeklySummary10: When choosing between two options, trust your gut; you already know.
rhythm.weeklySummary11: Family, home, or inner safety; a call or a tidy-up can ground you.
rhythm.weeklySummary12: Set a small next-phase goal or wish; writing it down makes it real.
rhythm.monthlySummary1: This month tidy rhythm and foundations. Work: basics. Love: pace. Self: boundaries.
rhythm.monthlySummary2: No need to shine; prepare, learn, or build habits quietly.
rhythm.monthlySummary3: Start turning ideas into small actions; test before going all in.
rhythm.monthlySummary4: Pace picks up; when busy, choose what to do and what to decline.
rhythm.monthlySummary5: Good for networking, deals, collaboration; also notice who drains you.
rhythm.monthlySummary6: Look back at the first half; keep what works, let go of the rest.
rhythm.monthlySummary7: More solitude, less social; think before you move.
rhythm.monthlySummary8: Earlier efforts may pay off; share credit with those who helped.
rhythm.monthlySummary9: One small goal or habit change is enough this month.
rhythm.monthlySummary10: Draw clear lines between work and rest so you can sustain.
rhythm.monthlySummary11: Count what you have; when you're steady, then expand.
rhythm.monthlySummary12: Finish loose ends and set one concrete wish for next year.
rhythm.yearSummary1: This year adjust rhythm and structure. Focus on foundations, boundaries, and pace.
rhythm.yearWork1: Don't rush to climb; shore up the base first.
rhythm.yearLove1: Value daily comfort over quick commitment.
rhythm.yearSelf1: Say no with grace; stop ineffective drain.
rhythm.yearSummary2: Try more paths in a safe range; small failures beat no start.
rhythm.yearWork2: Pivot, side projects, or new skills; validate small then scale.
rhythm.yearLove2: If single, get out more; if paired, do one new thing together.
rhythm.yearSelf2: Your pace is yours; no need to match others.
rhythm.yearSummary3: Put energy into fewer things; depth beats breadth.
rhythm.yearWork3: Pick one lane or skill and accumulate; avoid switching.
rhythm.yearSelf3: Less compare, more look inward; you set the bar.
rhythm.yearSummary4: Good year for allies and collaboration; reach out and reciprocate.
rhythm.yearWork4: Partner more, solo less; share gains so ties last.
rhythm.yearLove4: Partner or close friends mirror and support; listen before reacting.
rhythm.yearSelf4: Take care of yourself first, then others.
rhythm.yearSummary5: Some people and projects will fade; space opens for the new.
rhythm.yearWork5: End roles or projects with grace; no need to hold on.
rhythm.yearLove5: Some bonds come and go; cherish now over fixing outcomes.
rhythm.yearSelf5: Drop the “should” script; live as you approve.

pairing.elementCompatible: Complementary elements: one acts, one reflects; you can go far together.
pairing.elementOpposite: Opposite signs: attraction and tension; accept differences to mirror each other.
pairing.elementOther: Different elements: a bit of patience and communication finds the balance.

oracle.subtitle: Discover your cosmic energy blueprint
oracle.radarHint: Tap below to see your five-elements distribution
oracle.insightBalanced: Your elemental energy is remarkably harmonious. {{dom}} leads your celestial profile, granting you a unique inner strength. Stay centered and flow with the cosmic rhythm.
oracle.insightModerate: {{dom}} energy dominates your celestial blueprint, while {{weak}} seeks nourishment. Consider meditation and nature to strengthen your {{weak}} connection for greater balance.
oracle.insightUnbalanced: Your energy profile reveals a strong {{dom}} tendency with {{weak}} requiring special attention. The cosmos suggests integrating {{weak}}-aligned activities into your daily rituals.

cosmicMessage.title: One Sentence from the Universe Today
cosmicMessage.hiddenSignSubtitle: Beyond the sun, you have another side.
cosmicMessage.hiddenPunchDefault: The calmer you seem, the hotter the fire inside.

hiddenPunch.capricorn: You build the walls so that one day someone might climb over and catch you.
hiddenPunch.aquarius: The further you stand back, the more you crave a place where you never have to explain.
hiddenPunch.pisces: You meet the world with softness, but you have never surrendered to fate.
hiddenPunch.aries: The harder you charge, the more you fear someone will see you're only running from a wound you can't touch.
hiddenPunch.taurus: You hold on to what's stable because deep down you never believed it would stay.
hiddenPunch.gemini: You say so much; what you fear most is that none of it is truly heard.
hiddenPunch.cancer: The more you give, the more you fear the day they no longer need what you give.
hiddenPunch.leo: You step into the light because you cannot bear the dark of being unseen.
hiddenPunch.virgo: You judge the world so harshly because you have never spared yourself.
hiddenPunch.libra: You can't let go of either side of the scale—every choice feels like betraying the other half of you.
hiddenPunch.scorpio: The calmer you seem on the surface, the more the fire inside has nowhere to go.
hiddenPunch.sagittarius: The further you run, the more you fear that when you stop, there will be no answer.

oracle.archetypeTaglineFire: Your presence comes from action, not explanation.
oracle.archetypeTaglineWater: You don't need everyone to understand—only the right ones to read you.
oracle.archetypeTaglineWood: Your rhythm is growth, not sprint.
oracle.archetypeTaglineMetal: Your clarity isn't cold—it's respect for boundaries.
oracle.archetypeTaglineEarth: Your steadiness isn't slow—it's the ground others dare to land on.
oracle.archetypePowerFire: You're either burning or lighting others up. Your drive and directness are the courage many lack—don't apologize for your fire. Carry it forward and light the path you believe in.
oracle.archetypePowerWater: Deep currents don't compete; they carve stone. The warmth and acceptance you give will return to you one day. Take care of yourself first; you deserve to be read by the right people.
oracle.archetypePowerWood: Root down, shine up. Every step counts; you don't have to outrun anyone. Those who walk steadily arrive. Trust that you're becoming someone worth arriving as.
oracle.archetypePowerMetal: Only refined fire reveals the truth. Your clarity and boundaries let others breathe. Before tending to everyone else, save a place for yourself.
oracle.archetypePowerEarth: Those who carry the world don't need to prove it. Your steadiness isn't slow—it's the ground others dare to land on. Be gentle with your body and senses today; you deserve it.
oracle.seasonThemeHint: The cosmos is nudging you to order your rhythm and lay foundations—that matters more than quick results.
oracle.seasonHint: Right now the cosmos is nudging you to adjust your rhythm and structure. Focus on foundations, boundaries, and body-mind balance rather than quick results.
oracle.workHint: Build foundations first; go easy on new risks.
oracle.loveHint: Seeing the pace clearly matters more than the label.
oracle.selfHint: Establish routine and boundaries so your energy stays with you.
oracle.seasonThemeHintSet1:
The cosmos is nudging you to order your rhythm and lay foundations—that matters more than quick results.

You don't need to prove anything to anyone; be honest with yourself. Put energy into what compounds: steady your path, clarify boundaries, tune body and mind.

When the base is solid, then expand. Future you will thank today's you for not rushing for answers.
oracle.workHintSet1:
Build foundations and deliver on what's in front of you; go easy on new, risky bets.

Right now, learning, credentials, and clear process are investments in future you. You don't need a breakout moment—just a bit more steadiness each day.

When the base is solid, consider change or expansion; that's when leaps have real footing.
oracle.loveHintSet1:
Seeing each other's pace and chemistry matters more than a quick "label."

Let the relationship settle in natural interaction: who waits for you, who gets your silence—time will tell.

When you're both steady, then talk commitment and direction; that's when "we" is real.
oracle.selfHintSet1:
Establish routine and boundaries so your energy stays with you.

Leave room for solitude: sort your thoughts, move, or simply rest. You're not selfish—you're filling your cup so you can pour out.

Take care of yourself first; then the world sees a calm, bright you.
oracle.seasonThemeHintSet2:
These days the cosmos is saying: slow down—it matters more than rushing.

Focus on "who really matters" and "what's worth doing long-term." Prune the rest so your roots go deep.

What you don't do today may be the energy you save for tomorrow.
oracle.workHintSet2:
Instead of spreading thin, do one or two things so well people remember.

Now is the time to go deep in your craft and build reputation, not to keep switching lanes. Your accumulation will one day become "it has to be you."

Steady rhythm beats chasing trends.
oracle.loveHintSet2:
Depth in relationship often comes from willingness to wait and listen.

No need to push for labels; see how you both handle pressure and silence. Those who can share the ordinary can weather the rest.
oracle.selfHintSet2:
Rest isn't laziness—it's so you have strength for the next start.

Sleep a bit more, say yes a bit less; save energy for what and who truly matter. When you take care of yourself, you can keep shining.
oracle.seasonThemeHintSet3:
The cosmos is giving you a "settling" phase—results may not show yet, but every step is laying track.

Rather than worry about what hasn't happened, do well what you can control today: people, health, habits. They all compound.

When the time comes, you'll thank this period of preparation.
oracle.workHintSet3:
Put "verifiable results" ahead of "looking busy."

Finish current projects, clarify boundaries, fill gaps. You don't have to change lanes, but do make your current lane steadier. Your craft will show in the next opportunity.
oracle.loveHintSet3:
Clarify what you want in relationship before deciding how to walk together.

Don't hide needs for the sake of harmony; healthy connection means saying "I need" and "I mind." Honesty lasts longer than surface peace.
oracle.selfHintSet3:
Your body and emotions are signaling—tired, tight, heavy are reminders to rest or adjust.

Less "should," more "what do I need now." Movement, sleep, solitude are investments in yourself. When you're steady, others can lean in.
oracle.seasonThemeHintSet4:
Now is more "sowing" than "harvesting."

Put energy into foundations, relationships, habits. Don't demand instant payoff; make each step count. A year from now you'll thank yourself for not chasing only quick returns.
oracle.workHintSet4:
Learning, credentials, networks—these "invisible assets" will pay off later.

No need to jump or pivot yet; steady your current path first, then expand. Your patience will read as professionalism and reliability.
oracle.loveHintSet4:
Good relationships need time to develop; no need to force an answer.

Enjoy the process: who helps you relax, who makes you want to grow—time will filter. The right person will show you "we" greater than "I."
oracle.selfHintSet4:
Boundaries aren't cold—they keep energy for what and who deserve it.

Learn to say no, to be alone, to feel okay without constant approval. The steadier you are, the better the quality of your presence.
oracle.seasonThemeHintSet5:
The cosmos is nudging you to "converge"—less scatter, more focus.

Rather than touching everything lightly, choose one or two things that matter and do them so well people remember. Same for relationships, work, health. Converging isn't retreating; it's gathering strength for the next opening.
oracle.workHintSet5:
Put "deliverable results" first; no matter how busy, without output it's spin.

Now is the time to close projects, settle methods, build systems you can reuse. Your accumulation will become leverage in the next phase.
oracle.loveHintSet5:
Quality of relationship depends on how honest and willing to listen you are.

Don't trade "going along" for surface harmony; those who can face disagreement with you go the distance. Be real first, then find someone who can hold that.
oracle.selfHintSet5:
Solitude and rest aren't escape—they're so you can come back stronger.

Leave time for yourself: move, read, or stare into space. You're not selfish; you're recharging. When you're full, you can light others up.
oracle.seasonThemeHintSet6:
These days the cosmos says: steady rhythm matters more than catching up.

Put "sustainable" ahead of "sprint"—body, relationships, work are long runs. The margin you keep today becomes tomorrow's calm.
oracle.workHintSet6:
Rather than chase every opportunity, make the ones you have count.

Go deep, build trust, produce something you can show. Your craft and reliability will open the next door. Less anxiety, more execution.
oracle.loveHintSet6:
Become whole yourself first, then see how two can complement.

Don't shrink to be loved; those who can hold all of you deserve all of you. Good relationship is addition, not sacrifice.
oracle.selfHintSet6:
Your feelings and needs deserve to be taken seriously—including by you.

Build routine, emotional boundaries, and solitude. You're not pleasing anyone; you're laying a floor. When the floor is solid, you can build anything on it.
oracle.seasonThemeHintSet7:
The cosmos is giving you a time to "sort"—people, goals, habits. You can reassess.

No need to expand yet; drop what doesn't fit, strengthen what does, then talk next steps. Empty a little so you can hold what matters more.
oracle.workHintSet7:
Put energy into what compounds: craft, network, reputation, health.

You don't have to change lanes, but do make your current lane clearer and more sustainable. Your steadiness will one day become others' trust.
oracle.loveHintSet7:
Relationship takes two; it's not one person adapting.

See who's willing to adjust for you and who only waits for you to adapt. Those who give both ways are worth the long investment. Stand steady yourself, then join hands.
oracle.selfHintSet7:
Taking care of yourself isn't selfish—it's the condition for being there for anyone.

Sleep more, move more, leave margin; take on less that doesn't matter and please fewer who don't. When you're well, the world sees a bright you.
